calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dan Rubenstein, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff JMDH Real Estate of San Francisco.
Jonathan Borenstein representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Jin Qiang Zhu is present.
Tao Feng representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 2121 Evans Avenue, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of May 18, 2009 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Nancy Regas, Not Reported. (218)
